hub.subtitle: Discover competitions, grants, and tech events curated for you.

hub.event1Desc: Build innovative solutions in 48 hours. Open for university students and professionals.
hub.event2Desc: Pitch your most creative solutions to real-world problems. Perfect for student innovators.
hub.event3Desc: Present your startup idea to top VCs and angel investors. Win up to ฿500,000 in funding.

hub.event5Desc: Develop cutting-edge AI solutions for healthcare and sustainability. ฿300,000 prize pool.
hub.event6Desc: An ideathon exclusively for high school students to solve community challenges using tech.

profile.title: Innovation Profile
profile.name: Somchai Developer
profile.bio: Full-stack Developer & IoT Enthusiast passionate about building smart city solutions and always ready to learn new technologies.

portfolio.p1Desc: Real-time city energy consumption display system built to analyze resource usage in municipal areas.
portfolio.p2Desc: Automated plant care system via moisture and light sensors, notifying through a mobile application.
portfolio.p3Desc: Redesigned user experience (UX) for a second-hand trading application focusing on ease of use.
portfolio.p4Desc: Prototype of a peer-to-peer micro-lending platform for students.
